chat.text: Hi, I want to know about the Web Development course.
Hello! We have an AI-First Web Development training covering React and AI. Should I send more details?
Yes, can you tell me the duration?
It's a 12-week course. We have Morning and Evening batches. Which suits you?
Evening batch would be better for me.
Great! I've registered your name for the evening batch. Details sent to your WhatsApp. Thanks!

hero.title: Modern Education Automation
hero.opening: JoyAutomations helps coaching centers and educational institutions automate their admissions, follow-ups, and student management through simple AI systems.

problem.title: The Problem We Solve
problem.text: Most academies lose students due to slow follow-ups, manual processes, and scattered tools like WhatsApp and Excel.

solution.title: Our Simple Solution
solution.text: We build simple systems that combine LMS, automation, and AI to handle everything from student enquiry to enrollment — automatically.

strength.title: Our Core Strength
strength.text: We have built multiple LMS platforms and AI-based learning tools, focusing on real-world solutions that actually work for growing education businesses.

who.title: Who We Work With
who.text: We primarily work with coaching centers and training institutes. We are also expanding our systems to build high-performance ERP solutions for schools and colleges, fully digitizing campus management.

vision.title: Our Strategic Vision
vision.text: We exist to turn the administrative burden of running an academy into a seamless, high-performance engine. By automating the entire student journey—from the first inquiry on WhatsApp to final enrollment—we empower educators to scale their impact without scaling their workload.
points: Turn WhatsApp into a 24/7 autonomous sales agent
Centralize all student data for instant clarity

labs.title: JoyAI Labs
labs.text: Alongside our automation work, we also run JoyAI Labs — where we teach students how to build real-world AI applications using modern tools and prompt-based workflows.

items.title: Built for Education
items.desc: We don’t build generic tools. Every feature is engineered to solve specific bottlenecks like fee collection and student tracking.

items.title: Zero-Complexity Logic
items.desc: If you can use WhatsApp, you can use our systems. We focus on practical, result-driven automation that works from Day 1.

items.title: High ROI Focus
items.desc: Our priority is increasing your admissions. We build systems that sell, follow up, and close leads while you sleep.

questions.q: How is JoyAutomations better than generic tools like Zapier?
questions.a: Unlike generic tools, we build a deeply integrated system tailored to your unique workflow. You get a dedicated technical infrastructure that grows with your institution, ensuring maximum performance without third-party limitations.
Absolutely. We don't store your data on our servers. The automation runs entirely on your own Google Sheets, WhatsApp API, or private database.

questions.q: How long does it take to see results?
questions.a: Most institutions see 10-15 hours saved per week in the very first week of deployment. You'll see immediate improvements in lead follow-up and management.

questions.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use this?
questions.a: No! If you can use WhatsApp, you can use our system. We design every dashboard and tool to be extremely simple and user-friendly.

questions.q: What happens if there is a technical issue?
questions.a: We provide dedicated support. Since we wrote the entire code ourselves, we can immediately fix any technical problems without relying on third parties.

questions.q: Can you automate according to our existing manual process?
questions.a: Definitively. We don't force a new process on you. We audit your current manual method and create a digital automation that matches your workflow.

questions.q: How do we start a project?
questions.a: Contact us directly! We will perform a free audit of your business and provide a plan for the automation you need.

questions.q: Will the software have our academy's branding?
questions.a: Yes! Everything from the admin portal to the student dashboard will feature your academy's name and logo.

hero.title: Imagine. Build. AI.
hero.subline: Stop wasting years on complex coding rules. We show you how to master the art of AI orchestration to build professional websites, smart automation systems, and full software applications from scratch. You will learn the exact workflows used by pros to turn any idea into a live, working product in record time — even if you are not a programmer.

philosophy.title:
Don't Just Learn Coding.
Build Products.

items.title: Architect

items.title: Orchestrate
items.desc: Don't just prompt. Master multi-agent orchestration and neural databases to build autonomous, intelligent systems.

items.title: Launch
items.desc: Don't just prototype. Integrate payments and deploy globally to turn your software into a high-revenue business.

WHAT: Build and deploy high-conversion, professional landing pages. 
HOW: Master modern UI architecture and responsive design using AI-accelerated workflows.
items.result: I launched my first live AI application.

items.title: Level 2: Full-Stack & Backend Systems
items.desc:
WHAT: Engineer data-driven SaaS products and robust backend APIs. 
HOW: Master Next.js for frontend and Python (FastAPI/Django) for high-performance REST APIs.

items.title: Level 3: Agentic AI Systems Lead
items.desc:
WHAT: Build autonomous AI agents that handle enterprise business workflows independently. 
HOW: Use Python and n8n to architect self-executing systems using RAG and MCP protocols.
items.result: I deploy intelligent AI agent systems.
